label: Strategy Floor V2 - Full Eden square calibration
source: Composite preview from Eden Map (6).png plus West, East, South Sector 4, South Sector 3, and South Sector 2 captures, 2026-06-22
notes: Expanded transparent floor promoted from the approved West/East/South preview. The image is recentered onto a 1.6 aspect canvas so the original throne anchor remains at the image center and continues to align with world coordinate 800:800. Remaining north/south sectors can expand this same centered canvas later.
